info.hindI_arTa: mana meM vicAra kara kahanA praSaMsA karanA taraha taraha ke Sabda karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: viSabdanam - pratijYAnam  tacca Sabdena svABiprAyAvizkaraRam  tatonyasminnarTe asya DAtoH prayogaH  ' Guzir Sabde ' ityanye peWuH  ' GuzerviSabdanAdO RO GozayatyaviSabdane  GozatItidito GuMzed GUMzate kAntikarmaRi ' (Slo. 169-170) iti devaH   itoDikaM vivaraRaM mA.DA.vfttO drazwavyam

upasargachandrika.example_text: azwADyAyyAM (7.2.28) ityatra vfttO saNGuzwaM vAkyamAha saNGuzitaM vAkyamAhetyudAharaRe uccErudIritamityarTaH
'avaGuzwe samAje ca' (BA0 Adi0 13410) vIrasamUhe qiRqIravaSabdenAhUte sati avaGuzwAnnam asti kaScidiha BojanenArTItyevamuccErGozaM kftvA yad dIyate tattaToktam
asti cAtrArTe BArate prayoga:-- 'avaGuzwaM ca yad Buktam' (BA0 anu0 235)
'aho dAnaM viGuzwaM te sumahat svargavAsiBiH' (BA0 315433) viGuzwamuccErGozitam
'Asya SravasyAd A ca GozAt' (f0 5373) AGozAt saMSravasya vizayaH syAdityarTaH
